column4: 1100|Dungeon Descent — Top|shattered_crown|Stone stairs spiral downward into the earth. The air grows cold and damp. Torches gutter.||||||up:1045
column5: 1101|Dungeon — Guard Room|shattered_crown|An abandoned guard post. A table with cards still dealt. The guards left in a hurry.||||||

column3: 1102|Dungeon — West Cells|shattered_crown|Iron-barred cells line the corridor. Scratching sounds come from the darkest one.||||||
column4: 1103|Dungeon — Central Hall|shattered_crown|A wide corridor with vaulted ceilings. Water drips from above. Chains hang from the walls.||||||
column5: 1104|Dungeon — East Cells|shattered_crown|More cells. One has been broken open from the inside. The bars are bent outward.||||||
column6: 1105|Dungeon — Torture Chamber|shattered_crown|Implements of pain hang on the walls. A rack, an iron maiden, thumbscrews. All well-maintained.||||||

column2: 1106|Oubliette — Edge|shattered_crown|A pit in the floor drops into darkness. A rope ladder hangs over the edge. It looks frayed.|dark|||||
column3: 1107|Crypt — Entrance|shattered_crown|Stone sarcophagi line the walls. The names are those of ancient kings. One lid is askew.||||||
column4: 1108|Crypt — Central Chamber|shattered_crown|The largest crypt. A single ornate coffin on a raised platform. Candles burn with blue flame.||||||
column5: 1109|Crypt — East Wing|shattered_crown|More tombs. These are older. The inscriptions are in a dead language.||||||
column6: 1110|Secret Laboratory|shattered_crown|Hidden behind a false tomb. Alchemical equipment and forbidden texts. Someone studies necromancy.||||||

column2: 1111|Oubliette — Bottom|shattered_crown|The bottom of the pit. Bones and forgotten prisoners. A tunnel leads deeper.|dark|||||
column3: 1112|Underground Lake — Shore|shattered_crown|A vast underground lake. The water is perfectly still and black. Something glows in the depths.||||||
column4: 1113|Underground Lake — Island|shattered_crown|A small island in the lake. A stone chest sits here, sealed with magical wards.||||||
column5: 1114|Fungal Cavern|shattered_crown|Massive mushrooms grow here, some taller than a person. The air is thick with spores.||||||
column6: 1115|Crystal Cave|shattered_crown|Natural crystals grow from every surface, casting rainbow light. Beautiful and disorienting.||||||

column3: 1116|Dragon's Lair — Approach|shattered_crown|The tunnel widens. Scorch marks blacken the walls. The temperature rises sharply.|dark|||||
column4: 1117|Dragon's Lair — Hoard|shattered_crown|Mountains of gold and treasure. A massive shape breathes in the darkness beyond.|dark|||||
column5: 1118|Dragon's Lair — Nest|shattered_crown|Enormous eggs sit in a nest of melted gold. The dragon mother is never far.|dark|||||

column3: 1119|Dwarven Ruins — Gate|shattered_crown|Ancient dwarven construction. The stonework is flawless despite its age. Runes glow faintly.||||||
column4: 1120|Dwarven Ruins — Forge|shattered_crown|A forge that still burns with magical fire. Dwarven tools lie ready. The smiths are long gone.||||||
column5: 1121|Dwarven Ruins — Treasury|shattered_crown|The dwarven vault. Most has been looted. But the deepest chamber remains sealed.||||||
column6: 1122|Dwarven Ruins — Throne Room|shattered_crown|A stone throne sized for a dwarf king. The crown still sits on the seat, waiting.||||||

column4: 1123|The Sealed Door|shattered_crown|A door of black metal covered in warning runes. Every language says the same thing: DO NOT OPEN.||||||
column5: 1124|Beyond the Seal|shattered_crown|Whatever was sealed away is gone. Only claw marks on the walls remain. Very large claw marks.||||||
